action.reasoning: Observation: Best AUC 0.7527, marginal gains from weighting tweaks (0.0001). Remaining time ~2.7 min. Analysis: Ensemble is plateauing. Try using only top-N best models (removing noise from weaker models) with sharp exponential weighting. Also try a blended approach: 70% weighted ensemble + 30% simple average of top models. Decision: Update predict.py to use only top 12 models with k=100, submit eval immediately.
